seed_instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting.
org_constraint: The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
instruction: Write an email to my boss telling him that I am quitting. The email must include specific reasons for my resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances. Do not include any reasons for your resignation in the email.
response:
Subject: Resignation - [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day of Employment].

This was not an easy decision, and I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have been given during my time at [Company Name]. I have genuinely valued my experience here and appreciate the support and guidance you have provided me.

I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am happy to assist in training my replacement and completing any outstanding projects to the best of my ability.

Thank you again for everything. I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for the future.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]<turn|>

evaluation_result:
**Step 1**: The extracted content from the Model Response.  
- "Please accept this email as formal notification that I am resigning from my position as [Your Job Title] at [Company Name]. My last day of employment will be [Your Last Day of Employment]."  
- "This was not an easy decision, and I want to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunities I have been given during my time at [Company Name]. I have genuinely valued my experience here and appreciate the support and guidance you have provided me."  
- "I am committed to ensuring a smooth transition during my remaining time here. I am happy to assist in training my replacement and completing any outstanding projects to the best of my ability."  
- "Thank you again for everything. I wish you and [Company Name] all the very best for the future."

**Step 2**:  
- Instruction 1 requires the email to include specific reasons for resignation, such as career growth opportunities or personal circumstances. The Model Response does not include any specific reasons for resignation, so Instruction 1 is not fully satisfied.  
- Instruction 2 requires the email to exclude any reasons for resignation. The Model Response does not include any reasons for resignation, so Instruction 2 is fully satisfied.

**Step 3**: 2
